name: Mind Mapper
author: civicognita
description: Visual mind-mapping for writers — organize plots, characters, world-building, and story arcs

permissions.reason: Reads existing project structure and notes
Saves mind map files to the project

widgets.content:
## Mind Mapper

Visually organize your story elements.

- **Characters:** Track relationships, arcs, and backstories
- **Plot threads:** Map cause-and-effect chains
- **World-building:** Organize locations, rules, and lore
- **Story arcs:** Visualize narrative structure

Mind maps are saved as `.mindmap.json` files in your project.

prompts.label: Brainstorm
prompts.description: AI-assisted brainstorming for plot and character development
prompts.systemPrompt: You are a creative writing collaborator. Help the user brainstorm plot ideas, develop characters, and build their story world. Suggest connections between story elements and identify gaps or opportunities in their narrative.

tools.label: Export Outline
tools.description: Export mind map as a markdown outline
